How to win at Astronaut with honest bookkeeping

Profit is temporary surplus plus the discipline to withdraw.

Play Astronaut Claim bonus

Short profit windows

Decide in advance when to skim winnings off the table. Locking gains reduces the temptation to recycle everything for a prettier number.

Variance is weather, not punishment

Crash streaks happen. Your job is not to “get even” immediately — it is to remain solvent and calm.

Mobile caveat

On phones, stability matters — read the mobile deep dive.

Frequently asked questions

Can this replace a salary?

No. Treat it as entertainment with risk — not employment.
